case_title: ZAKI JONES ET AL VS. ALASKA AIRLINES

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY JONES, ZAKI YU, ZHIWEI ALASKA AIRLINES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2024 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS ZAKI JONES AND ZHIWEI YU ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WENDY REEDICK. PLAINTIFF ZHIWEI YU IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI #301135. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, ZAKI YU, ZHIWEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES $525.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,048.00 FILED BY JONES, ZAKI YU, ZHIWEI AS TO DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, ZAKI YU, ZHIWEI AS TO DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES
